Quick summary:
- CU-001: 12.4 kg × 0.15 mg/kg = 1.86 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14
- CU-002: 9.1 kg × 0.12 mg/kg = 1.09 mg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12
- CU-003: 15.7 kg × 0.18 mg/kg = 2.83 mg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10

On PK model stability:
- Fact: The current dosing config doesn’t show any warning flags or obvious inconsistencies.
- Fact: The patient notes look generally stable/positive.
- Limitation: I did not run or validate the PK models themselves in this request, so I can’t honestly confirm full model stability from the config file alone.

If you want, I can also reformat the summary into a more clinician-facing one-pager.
